name: Falstad
description: An Assassin that can fly large distances, excelling on large battlegrounds.
title: Wildhammer Thane
info: Falstad is the High Thane of the Wildhammer Clan and a founding member of the Council of Three Hammers that presides over Ironforge. Despite speculation, Falstad has never been dead and anyone who claims such is a liar.

Falstad.name: Hammerang
Falstad.description: Throw out a Hammer that returns to Falstad, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies hit by 25% for 2 seconds. Reactive to explode the Hammer, dealing 95 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

Falstad.name: Lightning Rod
Falstad.description: Deal 107 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy, and an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage every 0.9 seconds for 4 seconds while close to the target. Deals 100% increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.

Falstad.name: Barrel Roll
Falstad.description: Dashes forward and grants a 171 (+4% per level) point Shield for 3 seconds.

Falstad.name: Mighty Gust
Falstad.description: Push enemies away, and Slow them by 40%, decaying over 4 seconds.

Falstad.name: Hinterland Blast
Falstad.description: After 1 second, deal 475 (+4.75% per level) damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds for every enemy Hero hit.

Falstad.name: Tailwind
Falstad.description: Gain 15% increased Movement Speed after not taking damage for 5 seconds.

Falstad.name: Flight
Falstad.description: Instead of mounting, Falstad can fly a great distance over terrain.

1.name: Gathering Storm
1.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Hammerang. Restore 6 Mana for each Hero hit. Upon dying, Lose 8 stacks.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals 30% more damage.  Reward: After hitting 80 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 50% damage.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 150 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 70% damage.

1.name: Dishonorable Discharge
1.description: Quest: Each Lightning Rod strike upon a Hero after the 3rd generates 1 stack. If a Hero dies under its effect, generate 2 stacks.  Reward: After 20 stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.  Reward: After 45 stacks, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.  Mythic Reward: After 75 stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for 1.25 seconds.

1.name: Frequent Flyer
1.description: Activate Frequent Flyer to gain 25% Attack Speed and Tailwind for 4 seconds.  Quest: Minion kills grant 1 stack. Hero Takedowns grant 5 stacks.  Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.  Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.  Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.

4.name: Static Shield
4.description: Lightning Rod strikes grant a Shield equal to 4% of Falstad's maximum Health, up to 28%, for 4 seconds.

4.name: Updraft
4.description: Increases Barrel Roll's range by 40% and Shield amount by 70%, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.

4.name: Hammer Gains
4.description: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt to the primary target.

7.name: Secret Weapon
7.description: Increases Hammerang's range by 30% and Basic Attacks deal 75% bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.

7.name: BOOMerang
7.description: Hammerang's explosion deals 100% additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 3 seconds.

7.name: Thunderstrikes
7.description: Lightning Rod deals 25% more damage each subsequent strike.

10.name: Hinterland Blast
10.description: After 1 second, deal 475 (+4.75% per level) damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds for every enemy Hero hit.

10.name: Mighty Gust
10.description: Push enemies away, and Slow them by 40%, decaying over 4 seconds.

13.name: Charged Up
13.description: Increases Lightning Rod range by 25%. Hero Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.

13.name: Flow Rider
13.description: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge 100% faster.

13.name: Sustained Winds
13.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to 2% while Tailwind is active.

16.name: Crippling Hammer
16.description: Increase Hammerang's Slow from 25% to 50%, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.

16.name: Aerie Gusts
16.description: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from 5 to 3 seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from 15% to 25%.

16.name: Afterburner
16.description: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by 60%, decaying over 3 seconds.

20.name: Call of the Wildhammer
20.description: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals 25% more damage.

20.name: Wind Tunnel
20.description: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for 4 seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.

20.name: Nexus Frenzy
20.description: Increases Attack Speed by 20% and Attack Range by 1.1.

20.name: Epic Mount
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by 50 seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to 0.5 seconds, and increase the speed by 50%.

tooltipMarkup.FalstadBarrelRoll: Dashes forward and grants a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BarrelRoll,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> point Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BarrelRoll,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadBarrelRollAfterburnerTalent: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,BarrelRollRelicBuff,MaxStackCount*Behavior,BarrelRollRelicBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,BarrelRollRelicBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadBarrelRollUpdraftTalent: Increases Barrel Roll's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,FalstadMasteryUpdraftBarrelRoll,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value / Actor,FalstadBarrelRollGuide,Height*100"player = "0"/>%</c> and Shield amount by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadBarrelRollUpdraft,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit /Behavior,BarrelRoll,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit -1*100"/>%</c>, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadChargedUpTalent: Increases Lightning Rod range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,FalstadMasteryLightningRodChargedUp,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value/Abil,FalstadLightningRod,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>. Hero Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadEpicMountTalent: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,FalstadMasteryFlightEpicMount,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, and increase the speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadFlight: Instead of mounting, Falstad can fly a great distance over terrain.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadFlowRiderTalent: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadGatheringStormTalent: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Hammerang. Restore Mana for each Hero hit. Upon dying, Lose stacks.Reward: After hitting Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals % more damage.Reward: After hitting Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional % damage.Mythic Reward: After hitting Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional % damage.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadHammerGainsTalent: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FalstadWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to the primary target.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadHammerang: Throw out a Hammer that returns to Falstad, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HammerangDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing enemies hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * Behavior,HammerangSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HammerangSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Reactive to explode the Hammer, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FalstadHammerangBOOMerangDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadHammerangBOOMerangTalent: Hammerang's explosion deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 *Effect,FalstadHammerangBOOMerangDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BOOMerang].Modifier"/>%</c> additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,FalstadHammerangBOOMerangArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadHammerangBOOMerangArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadHammerangCripplingHammerTalent: Increase Hammerang's Slow from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HammerangSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Behavior,HammerangSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,FalstadMasteryCripplingHammerHammerang,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)" player="0"/>%</c>, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.

The cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,FalstadHinterlandBlastModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds for every enemy Hero hit.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadHinterlandBlastCalloftheWildhamme: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HinterlandBlastDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FalstadCallOfTheWildhammer].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadLightningRod: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FalstadLightningRodInitialDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to an enemy, and an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FalstadLightningRodDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.9</c> seconds for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadLightningRodCasterBehavior,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds while close to the target. tooltipMarkup.FalstadLightningRodDishonorableDischarge: Quest: Each Lightning Rod strike upon a Hero after the 3rd generates stack. If a Hero dies under its effect, generate stacks.Reward: After stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.Reward: After stacks, its cooldown is reduced by seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.Mythic Reward: After stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadMightyGust: Push enemies away, and Slow them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,FalstadMightyGustSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="1"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadMightyGustSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadSecretWeaponTalent: Increases Hammerang's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> and Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadSecretWeapon,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"/>%</c> bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadStaticShieldTalent: Lightning Rod strikes grant a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FalstadLightningRodStaticShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"/>%</c> of Falstad's maximum Health, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FalstadLightningRodStaticShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*Behavior,FalstadLightningRodStaticShield,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadTailwind: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,FalstadTailwind,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" player="0"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed after not taking damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FalstadTailwindCooldownDisplay,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadTailwindAerieGustsTalent: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FalstadTailwindCooldownDisplay,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,FalstadTailwindCooldownDisplay,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse+Talent,FalstadMasteryAerieGustsTailwind,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,FalstadTailwind,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,FalstadTailwind,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,FalstadMasteryAerieGustsTailwind,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value)*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadTailwindFrequentFlyer: Activate Frequent Flyer to gain % Attack Speed and Tailwind for seconds.Quest: Minion kills grant stack. Hero Takedowns grant stacks.Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadTailwindSustainedWinds: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,FalstadTailwindSustainedWindsDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]" precision ="2"/>%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,FalstadTailwindSustainedWindsImprovedDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> while Tailwind is active.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadThunderstrikesTalent: Lightning Rod deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,FalstadThunderstrikesAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> more damage each subsequent strike.
tooltipMarkup.FalstadWindTunnelTalent: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.
tooltipMarkup.NexusFrenzyTalent: Increases Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NexusFrenzyCarryBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and Attack Range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusFrenzyCarryBehavior,Modification.WeaponRange" precision="2"/></c>.
